name: Gouki Dragon Ogre
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>剛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鬼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ドラゴン・オーガ
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
If this card is Synchro Summoned: You can add 1 "Gouki" Spell from your Deck to your hand. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 EARTH monster you control; while you control that face-up monster, your opponent's monsters can only target it for attacks, also add 1 "Gouki" monster with less ATK than that monster from your GY to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Gouki Dragon Ogre" once per turn.
mnst_eff:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters

If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 EARTH monster you control; while you control that face-up monster, your opponent's monsters can only target it for attacks, also add 1 "Gouki" monster with less ATK than that monster from your GY to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Gouki Dragon Ogre" once per turn.

You can only use each effect of "Gouki Dragon Ogre" once per turn.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
